name: refactor-modularize
description: Break monolithic code into smaller, focused modules

target.description: File or directory to refactor (default: largest file)

max-lines.description: Maximum lines per module after refactoring

steps.task: Analyze {{target}} and identify logical boundaries for extraction. Group related functions, classes, and types. Produce a refactoring plan listing each new module, what it will contain, and which imports change. Target {{max-lines}} lines per module.

Execute the refactoring plan from step 1: extract modules, move code, update imports and exports. Each new module should have a single clear responsibility. Preserve all existing public API surface (re-export from the original file if needed).
Run the full test suite and verify no regressions. If tests reference internal functions that moved, update the imports. Add tests for any newly exposed module boundaries.
Verify the build compiles cleanly with no errors or warnings. Check that no circular dependencies were introduced. Update documentation to reflect the new module structure.
